figures.caption: Figure 3. Comparison of different ISP methods on object detection and instance segmentation tasks. Reference images are well-lit scenes from the LOD and LIS datasets, with brightness increased by 1.5× for visualization. More results are in the supplementary material.

Figure 4. Qualitative comparison on image enhancement. We use the images retouched by Expert C from the Adobe FiveK dataset as ground truth. Our method more closely matches the brightness and color tones of the ground truth.
Figure 5. Optimization behavior. (a) Task score on the test set over training progress. (b) (left) policy entropy convergence and (right) relative likelihood of the final pipeline.
